# v1.0.15

## 改进

- 更新 `rules.example.toml` 的 AI Review 示例配置，默认示例更适合较大的 MR。
- README 的 AI Review 示例同步推荐 `batch_review = true`、更小的批次和更长的请求超时。

## 推荐配置

```toml
[[ai_reviews]]
timeout_seconds = 900
request_timeout_seconds = 180
batch_review = true
max_batch_diff_bytes = 15000
max_batches = 10
```

## 发布包

- Windows x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v1.0.15-windows-x86_64.zip`
- Ubuntu x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v1.0.15-linux-x86_64.tar.gz`
